surface_verification.justification: Framework SessionStart-hook runtime change + new shared helper (event_once.py). No application/web/UI/API/store/SSE surface in this monorepo. Verified via 21 unit tests AND a concurrent 12-subprocess empirical probe (real multi-process fan-out -> block emitted exactly once).

behaviors.behavior: First invocation of a SessionStart event emits the Phase-Quality block; subsequent invocations of the same event skip it (once-per-event)
A TTL-expired claim from a later event (resume/compact reusing the session id) re-emits
Exactly one of N concurrent invocations wins per event (atomic, race-safe via O_CREAT|O_EXCL)
behaviors.evidence: test_event_once.py::test_concurrent_invocations_exactly_one_winner; plus empirical 12-subprocess probe -> emitted by 1 (PROBE PASS)

behaviors.behavior: Env context (SESSION_ID/PROJECT_ROOT/loop vars) + CLAUDE_ENV_FILE write are NOT gated by the dedup (AC-4/AC-7)
behaviors.evidence: test_capture_session_id.py::test_phase_quality_block_emitted_then_deduped asserts SHIPWRIGHT_PROJECT_ROOT present on the deduped invocation; existing env/loop/env-file tests still pass

behaviors.behavior: Any guard error fails open (emits) rather than dropping a FAIL
audit_only opt-out suppresses the block and creates no cache file
A different session id (distinct event) re-emits independently

degraded.detail: shared/tests/test_architecture_md_reflects_arch_impact.py fails LOCALLY on 2 gitignored foreign decision-drops (iterate-2026-06-01-ci-launch-hardening, -upload-sarif-test-fix) lacking architecture.md entries. Not caused by this 4-file diff. decision-drops are gitignored -> CI sees none -> passes vacuously. Not a merge blocker.
